title: citrus × aurantium subf. hakunikuyu
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. hakunikuyu, also known as Yuzu, is a citrus plant hybrid that originated from the cross between Citrus junos and Citrus aurantium. The medicinal properties of Citrus × aurantium subf. hakunikuyu are attributed to its high concentration of limonene and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Yuzu include its ability to boost the immune system, aid in digestion, and reduce stress levels, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies. Yuzu can be prepared as a tea, juice, or oil, and is also used in culinary applications to add flavor and aroma to various dishes.
